heroBanner.description: Single hero banner establishing Night Cat brand identity and outdoor camping positioning. Clean, outdoor-focused visual gateway.
heroBanner.brandIdentityNote: Minimalist approach - single hero banner with minimal editorial investment. Reflects brand's video-first strategy.

pages.designNote: Homepage with minimal editorial content. Single hero banner (855x341) + product grid driven by video content. No supporting banners or multiple editorial sections.
Product category page with zero editorial images. Pure video-based product presentation. 9 videos driving visual merchandising. Product grid only, no hero banner imagery.
Minimal category page. 2 videos + product grid. No editorial images or hero banner.
Minimal category page. 2 videos + product grid. No editorial images.
Minimal category page. 3 videos + product grid. No editorial images.
Moderate video content. 7 videos + product grid. No editorial images. Pure video-driven merchandising.
Product category page. 4 videos + product grid. No editorial images.
Minimal category page. 2 videos + product grid. No editorial images.
Product category page. 5 videos + product grid. No editorial images.
Product category page. 6 videos + product grid. No editorial images.

colorScheme.rationale: Straightforward, functional design letting product videos dominate visual presentation

typography.characteristics: Clean, minimal typographic hierarchy. Category names in sentence case. Functional rather than commanding.

photography.style: Virtually absent - brand relies on video content instead of photography
photography.subjects: Only 1 editorial image across entire store (on Startseite, 855x341). No lifestyle or brand photography investment beyond hero.

videoContent.distribution: 45 unique videos across 10 pages (avg 4.5 per page)
videoContent.coverage: Every category page relies on video for product presentation
videoContent.rationale: Outdoor/camping equipment heavily demonstrated via video content showing product setup, use cases, features in action

layoutPatterns.homepage: Single hero banner (1872x400 estimated) + video tiles + product grid
layoutPatterns.categoryPages: No hero banners on sub-pages. Direct to video content + product grid.
layoutPatterns.contentRichPages: Absent - zero content-rich pages with editorial sections. All pages video + grid focused.

hierarchyStructure.navigationDepth: 1 level - flat navigation, no sub-categories or nested structure
hierarchyStructure.pageCount: 10 pages total (excluding duplicate 'Alle Angebote' and shared Amazon Basics page)
hierarchyStructure.distribution: Extremely concentrated video usage on product category pages rather than editorial distribution
hierarchyStructure.strategy: Minimal editorial investment. Maximum video utilization. Chinese outdoor brand prioritizing product demonstration over brand storytelling.

distribution.rationale: Only editorial image investment - minimal hero visual gateway. Video content drives immediate product engagement.
Highest video concentration - flagship tent category. Pure video-based merchandising showing hanging tent setup and features.
Strong video presence for ultralight tent category. Videos demonstrate pack weight, setup, durability.
Accessory category with substantial video content.
Water-sports related product - videos show product in use scenarios.
Backpack category with moderate video coverage.
Pop-up tent category with minimal video content.
Minimum viable video coverage - 2 videos per category driving product grid.

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Minimal editorial presence reflects lean brand positioning. Single hero image on homepage. Video-first approach shows product functionality, setup, and real-world application rather than lifestyle aspirational content. Clean, functional design prioritizing product discovery and video demonstration over brand storytelling.
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Practical outdoor enthusiasts, camping hobbyists, hikers, water-sports participants seeking functional gear at value price points
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Flat, 1-level navigation with 10 product categories. No nested sub-categories or brand storytelling pages. Direct-to-product-grid approach. Minimal content investment (1 editorial image total) suggests focus on product quality and video demonstration as primary trust-building mechanism. Videos serve as product storytelling vehicle rather than lifestyle brand content.
brandIdentity.contentStrategy: Extremely video-heavy (45 videos vs 1 image). This is unconventional for most retail brands but functional for outdoor equipment category where demonstrating setup, durability, and use-cases via video is more persuasive than static photography. Chinese outdoor brand leveraging video-first merchandising over traditional editorial brand investment.

keyObservations.videoHeavy: Virtually all product presentation relies on video content. 45 unique videos across 10 pages represents video-first merchandising strategy unusual for typical Amazon store designs.
keyObservations.minimalBrandInvestment: Only 1 editorial image across entire store. No lifestyle imagery, no brand storytelling sections, no 'About Us' or brand narrative pages. Pure product-focused approach.
keyObservations.flatNavigation: Simple 1-level navigation with no nested categories or product browsing hierarchy. Direct access to 10 product categories from homepage.
keyObservations.noEditorialPageTypes: Unlike ESN's diverse page types (brand story, testimonials, educational content), Night Cat has zero content-rich pages. All pages follow video + grid formula.
keyObservations.categoryVariation: Video counts vary significantly (2-9 videos per category), suggesting data-driven or sales-based video allocation rather than consistent template approach.
keyObservations.efficientDesignModel: Minimal page template variation, minimal editorial asset creation, maximum reliance on product video content. Reflects lean brand resource model or deliberate focus on demonstrating product functionality over brand mythology.
